'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 139''' was the one hundred thirty-ninth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[August 25]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Andy Lane]] and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Republic 64|Weeding Out The Sith]]
*[[Clone Wars/Legends|Worlds of the Clone Wars]]
*[[Lott Dod/Legends|Lott Dod]]
*[[Lufta Shif/Legends|Lufta Shif]]
*[[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]]
*[[Khabarakh]] and the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]]
*[[Mara Jade Skywalker]]
*[[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]
*[[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]
*''[[Stinger]]''
